description: Spring REST controller calling Log4j logger.info() through interface dispatch via Processor interface implemented by LogProcessor, triggering CVE-2021-44228 Log4Shell.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: App.java calls processor.process(data) where processor is a Processor interface. LogProcessor implements Processor and calls logger.info() with user input.

findings.human_justification: logger.info() is called in LogProcessor.process() which implements the Processor interface. The controller dispatches through the interface with user-controlled input, making the vulnerability exploitable via dynamic dispatch.
